ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( RecordType18ID__c = '012b0000000M3zQAAS',
$Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator',
ISCHANGED(StageName), !UpdatedByNextStageFlow__c )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please update the stage for New Sale/Upsell opps using the MEDDPICC flow
